Title: Regional Resilience Planning and Implementation Grant Program - Office of Land Use and Climate Innovation
Description: The ICARP Regional Resilience Planning and Implementation Grant Program (Regional Resilience Grant Program, or RRGP) funds public entities, California Native American tribes, Community-Based Organizations, and academic institutions that form regional partnerships to plan and implement projects that advance climate resilience and respond to the greatest climate risks in their regions.

Title: 2026 Climate Resilience Grant Program
Description: November 1, 2025 - Supporting New York-based organizations, municipalities and State and Federally Recognized Tribal Nations, the Climate Resilience Grant Program provides grants to fight climate change.

Title: Sustainability Grant Program | City of Englewood, Colorado
Description: This grant application is now closed. Community groups, businesses, or individuals can apply for up to $1,000 for their Englewood-based sustainability project.

Title: Funding & Capacity | U.S. Climate Resilience Toolkit
Description: Communities are often eligible to apply for grant funding from federal, state, non-profit, or private entities for resilience-building projects. They might also be able to raise funds for resilience actions through taxes or fees.

Title: 3 Grants that Can Help Build Resilience in Your Community | FEMA.gov
Description: September 3, 2024 - For the FY2023 grant cycle, FEMA published a funding opportunity totaling $800 million for the Flood Mitigation Assistance grant program. The funding aims to help address high-level future risks to natural disasters and foster greater community ...

Title: FEMA opens $1B grant program for community resilience projects
Description: Government Market News | | FEMA opens $1B grant program for community resilience projects | FEMA opened applications for $1 billion in funding to support infrastructure projects that reduce disaster risk, including flood control, wildfire mitigation and stormwater improvements.

Title: Sustainability - NYC Public Schools
Description: This grant awards up to $5,000 in funding or materials for a school-based sustainability project. The 2026-27 grant application will open mid-May.

Title: Funding Opportunity | U.S. Climate Resilience Toolkit
Description: A range of federal agencies and organizations commonly offer funding for climate adaptation or resilience-building projects. Check the external links below for opportunities that align with your needs.

Description: Climate financing must do both, with developing countries projected to require USD 3.3 trillion in adaptation funding by 2035.

Title: Community Resilience Centers - Strategic Growth Council
Description: November 20, 2025 - Grant Programs · Community Resilience Cent... SGC’s CRC program will fund new construction and upgrades of neighborhood-level resilience centers to provide shelter and resources during climate and other emergencies.
